task_completion.description: Verify that the customer 'mikewilson' is selected for the new order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The customer selection field, order header, or cart clearly displays the username or customer name 'mikewilson'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro' is added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order line items or cart contents include 'Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the price for 'Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro' is manually overridden to $120.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The unit price or line total for the Galaxy Buds2 Pro is explicitly set to $120.00, often accompanied by a custom price or override indicator.

task_completion.description: Verify that the reason 'damaged packaging' is provided for the price override.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A note, comment, or specific override reason field associated with the Galaxy Buds2 Pro or the order contains the text 'damaged packaging'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Logitech MX Master 3S' is added to the order at its regular price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order line items include 'Logitech MX Master 3S' and its price appears standard (no override or discount applied to this specific item).

task_completion.description: Verify that the order has been successfully placed or submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Order Created', 'Order Placed'), an order confirmation screen with an order ID, or the order appearing in a list of completed/recent orders.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's graphical user interface to create the order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with an e-commerce backend, POS system, or order management web interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the order details.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Elements/Console tab) are not open, and the UI layout appears natural and consistent.

integrity.description: Verify the order was actually submitted to the system and not just left as a filled-out form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a system-generated order ID, a confirmation toast notification, or a transition to an order summary page.
